---
title: "Mentoring"
---

I have had the opportunity to mentor high school interns and undergraduate students on research projects in mechanical design, CAD,
3D printing / digital fabrication, and robotics. This included hands-on training on the Prusa, Carbon M1, and Stratasys J750 3D printers,
Instron material testing system, as well as design for additive manufacturing and Python programming.

**Yusef (Joe) Torky** - High School Intern, Transformative Robotics Lab, University of Washington -- Summer 2022<br>

**Nathan Zhang** - High School Intern, Transformative Robotics Lab, University of Washington -- Summer 2022<br>

**Natalie Paskett** - Bachelor of Applied Science, Engineering, Oregon State University -- Winter 2025<br>
